mnemonics.title: HDFS Node Roles
mnemonics.content: **N**ameNode **K**nows **N**ames, **D**ataNode **D**ata **D**wells. (The NameNode knows the file names and metadata, while the DataNode is where the actual data blocks are stored).

mnemonics.title: MapReduce Phases
mnemonics.content: **M**ap -> **S**huffle -> **R**educe. (The three sequential phases of a MapReduce job).
